---
title: "Monthly Budget Analysis"
description: "A simple Python project analysing monthly income and expenses."
author: "Serena Emedeke"
date: 2026-04-16
categories: [Python, Data Analysis, Budgeting]
---

## Overview

This project explores a simple monthly budget using Python.

## Python Code

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

budget = pd.DataFrame({
    "Category": ["Rent", "Food", "Transport", "Entertainment", "Savings"],
    "Amount": [800, 250, 100, 120, 300]
})

budget
```

```{python}
plt.bar(budget["Category"], budget["Amount"])
plt.xlabel("Category")
plt.ylabel("Amount (€)")
plt.title("Monthly Budget Breakdown")
plt.xticks(rotation=30)
plt.show()
```

## Reflection

This project helped me practise organising data and creating visualisations using Python.
